---
title: "instruction_loader.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\core\engine\instruction_loader.py"
loc: 56
complexity: 14
logic_score: 5.35
style_score: 3.68
intel_score: 8.54
overall_score: 4.12
---

## Intent
The `instruction_loader.py` sector implements high-complexity logic focusing on InstructionLoader, __init__, add_source, get_instructions, _fetch_skill_content. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via InstructionLoader, __init__, add_source, get_instructions, _fetch_skill_content. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 5.3/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 8.5/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)

### Exports
- `InstructionLoader`
- `__init__`
- `add_source`
- `get_instructions`
- `_fetch_skill_content`
